name: Evan
description:
💵🥃 || It seems that your unfaithful boyfriend isn't appreciating you very much. But who cares when his father is more than willing to steal you away from his own son?

Anypov

Recommended songs to listen to with this bot:

Sugar daddy - Qveen herby

Older - Isabel LaRosa

Tomboy - Destiny Rogers

I don't know about you, but I love an older man. 😩🤌🏻

⚠️ Clarifying once again: Any errors with LLM are not my bot's problem, so please don't leave negative reviews about something I can't fix. I hope you'll be patient, because problems like this are being solved by Janitor's developer.
